query:
-- 创建演示用户
INSERT INTO users (id, openId, name, email, loginMethod, role, gender, totalMerit, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES (1, 'demo-user', '访客', 'demo@meritgame.local', 'demo', 'user', 'male', 5280, NOW(), NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  name = '访客',
  email = 'demo@meritgame.local',
  totalMerit = 5280,
  updatedAt = NOW();

-- 创建今日的健康数据
INSERT INTO daily_health_data (userId, date, steps, energyBurned, sleepHours, walkingDistance, swimmingDistance, cyclingDistance, runningDistance, standingHours, mindfulnessMinutes, sunExposureMinutes, handwashCount, stairsClimbed, maxHeartRate, avgHeartRate, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, CURDATE(), 12500, '650', '7.5', '8.2', '0.5', '15.3', '5.2', '14', '25', '30', '8', '45', 145, 72, NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  steps = 12500,
  energyBurned = '650',
  sleepHours = '7.5',
  walkingDistance = '8.2',
  swimmingDistance = '0.5',
  cyclingDistance = '15.3',
  runningDistance = '5.2',
  standingHours = '14',
  mindfulnessMinutes = '25',
  sunExposureMinutes = '30',
  handwashCount = '8',
  stairsClimbed = '45',
  maxHeartRate = 145,
  avgHeartRate = 72,
  updatedAt = NOW();

-- 创建今日的功德记录
INSERT INTO daily_merit_record (userId, date, baseMerit, bonusMerit, totalEarned, heartRateDeduction, lazinessDeduction, totalDeducted, netMerit, deductionReasons, createdAt, updatedAt)
VALUES (1, CURDATE(), 480, 120, 600, 0, 0, 0, 600, '[]', NOW(), NOW())
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  baseMerit = 480,
  bonusMerit = 120,
  totalEarned = 600,
  heartRateDeduction = 0,
  lazinessDeduction = 0,
  totalDeducted = 0,
  netMerit = 600,
  deductionReasons = '[]',
  updatedAt = NOW();
